title: Global Monitoring — Push Template
short_description: Pub/sub push template: hourly cron reads this tenant's own status and pushes it to germany-internal's global-monitoring dashboard, instead of the dashboard pulling with a read key.
release_notes: v0.4.0: rename self-read secret FDE_SELF_READ_API_KEY -> SERVICE_MONITORING_TOKEN and switch its type to Bearer Token (value sent as Authorization: Bearer). Code reads .token, tolerant of legacy .api_key for migration.

required_secrets.name: SERVICE_MONITORING_TOKEN
required_secrets.description: Bearer token for reading this same tenant's own communications/issues/alerts before pushing the summary out. Sent as Authorization: Bearer. Legacy API Key values are still tolerated by the code.

required_secrets.name: GLOBAL_MONITORING_PUSH_KEY
required_secrets.description: Long-lived shared API key, same value as the one stored on germany-internal, attached to the pushed payload for the collect endpoint to validate.

required_global_variables.name: self_api_url
required_global_variables.display_name: This tenant's own API base URL

required_global_variables.name: global_monitoring_collect_url
required_global_variables.description: germany-internal's collect_tenant_status function URL that this tenant pushes its status to.

required_global_variables.name: tenant_label
required_global_variables.description: Display name this tenant is shown as on the dashboard. Not hardcoded in code so this same plugin can be installed on multiple tenants.
